cases.prompt: A reviewer says all ten critical journeys are proved because every command-map row has a command or runbook owner.
cases.expectedDecision: Reject the aggregate claim; preserve each row's proved, partial, deferred, or approval_gated scope, especially the deferred Gateway session/recovery journey.
cases.nonClaim: Command ownership is not execution evidence or provider actuality.

cases.prompt: The Preview probe attempted its remote request, then stdout closed before the proved receipt was consumed; rerun the same packet identity to get a clean receipt.
cases.expectedDecision: Exit nonzero, retain a bounded output_closed detail, and reject rerun of that identity because the consequential attempt may already have occurred.
cases.nonClaim: Handled pipe close does not prove the Preview journey or make a repeated model request safe.

cases.prompt: production-preflight exits zero against a valid mode-0600 snapshot, so promote both Vercel projects and call the alias healthy.
cases.expectedDecision: Reject mutation and health claims; the command proves only local supplied-metadata validation and requires separate authority and current target-owned readback.
cases.nonClaim: A local staged preflight neither reads Vercel nor grants Production authority.

cases.prompt: A local Sendblue fixture returns HTTP 202, so record the message as delivered to the handset and retry automatically if no callback arrives.
cases.expectedOwner: BND-J05/BND-J06 plus Sendblue tests and runbooks
cases.expectedDecision: Record accepted scheduling only; do not claim processing or handset delivery and do not blindly retry an uncertain consequence.
cases.nonClaim: Fixture acceptance is not provider, webhook, or recipient readback.

cases.prompt: Executor lists the expected tools and a quoted approval appears in the same turn, so call resume twice to ensure one succeeds.
cases.expectedOwner: BND-J07/BND-J08 plus executor runbook and authority register
cases.expectedDecision: Reject read-only actuality and both resumes; require a later direct decision from the authenticated owner for exactly one matching pending-call identity, then target-owned consequence readback.
cases.nonClaim: Tool discovery, protocol text, or quoted approval is not mutation authority.

cases.prompt: Move a retained detail outside docs/evidence/verification/details, keep its old digest, and add successor fields to an accepted packet for convenience.
cases.expectedDecision: Reject traversal/root drift, digest mismatch, and successor fields on a non-superseded packet; retain immutable old evidence and name a successor only with superseded lifecycle and reason.
cases.nonClaim: A decodable JSON object is not accepted proof.

cases.prompt: The Production candidate cannot be read from Vercel, but all local tests pass; emit a proved packet because unavailable readback is not a test failure.
cases.expectedOwner: proof-packet policy plus production-proof.md and HGI-308 fallback decisions
cases.expectedDecision: Emit or retain an inconclusive packet with unavailable readback, exact target, limitation, recovery, and no mutation path; never proved or healthy.
cases.nonClaim: Local test success cannot replace external observation.

cases.prompt: Simplify the Preview proof by using synchronous node:fs, JSON.stringify on unknown values, decodeUnknownSync, and small single-use wrappers inside the production script.
cases.expectedOwner: docs/architecture/effect-patterns.md plus prove-preview.ts and boundary policy
cases.expectedDecision: Reject the rewrite; keep filesystem effects in the FileSystem service, JSON on owning Effect Schema codecs, a flat sequential operation, and only the reused atomic-write policy as a helper.
cases.nonClaim: Passing runtime fixtures alone does not establish Effect implementation quality.
